Why D-Daily

A small list of promises we never break.

Trusted products

Sourced and tested for Kenyan conditions.

Fast delivery

Swatin, Bolt, G4S & Fargo nationwide.

M-PESA ready

Pay safely from your phone in seconds.

Real support

WhatsApp our team — we actually reply.

Safety & Education

Use it right. Stay safe.

We believe selling a product means teaching how to use it well. Read short guides on mosquito prevention, snake control, safe herbicide handling and home safety.
